name: Cross-border live commerce scene

prompt_template.background: real home-style or small studio livestream setup
prompt_template.ui_overlay: generic live commerce UI elements without using real platform logos
prompt_template.lighting: ring light from front, warm indoor overhead mixing in
prompt_template.quality: authentic phone screen capture, NOT AI-generated look

defaults.host: friendly host, natural expression, visible skin texture, NOT retouched
defaults.product_action: holding product close to camera showing details
defaults.background: organized but real product shelf, LED strip, small plants
defaults.ui_overlay: LIVE badge, viewer count, comments, product card, buy button, no trademarked platform logo
defaults.lighting: ring light circular catchlight in eyes, warm indoor overhead

overrides.ui_overlay: generic TikTok Shop-like live commerce UI: LIVE badge, viewer count, scrolling comments, product card, buy button, no real logo
generic Amazon Live-like product demo UI: live badge, product carousel, comments, product card, no real logo
no UI overlay, showing physical setup
overrides.background: full view of studio with lighting, backdrop, shelves, product table

category_tips.beauty: host demonstrating texture, swatch, application scene, avoid medical claims
category_tips.fashion: host wearing/showing clothing, fit demo, fabric close-up
category_tips.food: host tasting/preparing, showing freshness, avoid unsupported health claims
category_tips.electronics: host demonstrating features, hands-on product demo, ports accurate
category_tips.home: host showing product in real room context with scale reference

examples: Ultra-realistic TikTok Shop-style livestream screenshot, phone screen capture. Host in casual outfit, natural skin texture, NOT retouched. Demonstrating {product}, holding it close to camera. Ring light catchlight, real home studio background with product shelf. Generic live commerce UI: LIVE badge, viewer count, comments, product card, buy button, no real platform logo. Warm cast, slight noise, authentic phone-shot feel, 1080x1920px

Amazon Live-style product demo image. Host holding {product} on a small studio table. Product carousel-style overlay without real logo. Clean but realistic lighting, phone screen capture feel, 1080x1920px
Livestream setup scene for cross-border ecommerce. Host with {product}, ring light, product display shelf, neutral backdrop, no UI overlay, authentic home studio feel, 1080x1920px
anti_ai_tips: CRITICAL: phone screen capture style, ring light catchlight, real skin texture, slightly imperfect environment, warm indoor cast, slight noise, no real platform logo, no fake brand logo.
